scope_items.text: Real-time fraud scoring for all inbound retail and SME payment transactions
Automated cross-channel reconciliation for web, mobile, and partner API channels
ISO 20022 message formatting for outgoing settlement instructions
Real-time transaction status API for customers and operations
Dispute management workflow with SLA tracking
Corporate banking or treasury payment rails — addressed in a separate programme
Replacement or re-architecture of the core PayHub transaction engine
Customer-facing mobile app UI changes — limited to API layer only
Fraud model training and MLOps pipeline — existing risk team owns the model; this project integrates with the scoring endpoint
PayHub exposes a stable REST API for transaction event subscription and ledger queries — confirmed with integration team in pre-discovery
The fraud scoring model endpoint will be available in staging by Month 2 of the project
ISO 20022 regulatory deadline is Q4 2026 with no grace period extensions
Operations team headcount will be redeployed (not made redundant) upon automation go-live, subject to HR sign-off
